top_signals.title: Japan mulls easing travel advisory for Iran
top_signals.summary: The plan emerged as other countries move to resume business in the Middle East and Japanese companies in the region are calling to lower the travel advisory.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Europe wants to rebalance trade with Beijing, but can't quit Chinese air conditioners
top_signals.summary: A historic heat wave has driven unprecedented demand for Chinese-made air conditioners in Europe, underscoring the tough task Brussels faces in rebalancing trade with Beijing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
